hero.lead: Dream Legacy RP is a PlayStation 3 roleplay project. Join our Discord server, log in with Discord, and get ready to connect.

join.title: How to Join
join.desc: The steps below keep the community organized and make sure each player is ready before joining.
join.req5: A new PSN account for roleplay.
join.enlist1: Join the Dream Legacy RP Discord server.
join.enlist3: Log in on this site with Discord.
join.enlist4: Once verified, you are ready to connect.

map.title: Neighborhood Map
map.desc: Use the city map as a visual reference for districts, routes, scenes, and roleplay planning.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Choose your theme, music, and more.
settings.themeDesc: Pick a color palette inspired by the three protagonists.
settings.musicDesc: Paste a YouTube link to play music in the background.

apply.joinDesc: You need to be a member of the Dream Legacy RP Discord server before you can apply.
apply.title: Apply for Whitelist
apply.desc: Tell us about your character. We review every application manually and you'll get a DM on Discord once it's decided.
apply.pendingDesc: We've received your application and sent you a confirmation on Discord. We'll DM you as soon as it's reviewed.
apply.approvedDesc: You can now log in to the Panel to access DreamOS.
apply.deniedDesc: Reach out on our Discord server if you have questions or want to re-apply.

notify.themeNotLoggedIn: Log in with Discord to save your theme preference.
notify.discordLoginError: Something went wrong logging in with Discord. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Review, approve, or deny whitelist applications.
admin.searchPh: Search by RP name or Discord username...
admin.reasonPrompt: Reason for denying (optional, included in their DM):
admin.playerSearchPh: Search by RP name or Discord username...

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.desc: Read this before you connect. Breaking any of these is an immediate and final ban.
rules.server1: You must use the GTA:ODT Services.
rules.server2: No .sprx other than the one currently in use (chaos modz).
rules.rp1: No freezing, crashing, or kicking other players without permission.
rules.rp2: No abuse mods: god mode, vehicle upgrade, no-clip, etc.
rules.rp3: Avoid unrealistic movement: bunny hopping, running everywhere, super jumps, or glitches.
rules.rp4: No metagaming — don't use outside information (like voice recognition) inside the RP.
rules.rp5: NLR (New Life Rule): if you die, you must forget past events.
rules.rp6: No free killing — killing without a proper reason is not allowed.
rules.menuDesc: Open the menu and enable the following:
rules.menu1: Wanted level: 0 lock, so AI police won't disturb scenes.
rules.menu2: Off the radar — like FiveM, you won't see other players on the map (avoids metagaming too).
rules.menu3: Check the Animations tab and note the most useful ones.
rules.menu4: The menu will keep getting updated to be more RP-friendly.
rules.excusesDesc: In-character cover stories for real-life issues:
rules.excuseOther: Make up an excuse, or ignore it.
rules.assetsTitle: Banned Assets — Only Use What's Yours
rules.assetsDesc: Everything in-game must match what's actually on your account:
rules.assetWeapons: only what's in your Assets tab on the website.
rules.assetMoney: only what's in your Bank tab on the website.
rules.assetClothes: only clothes from stores, paid for with your money.
rules.assetPhone: only the phone you bought in the DreamOS tab.
rules.assetVehicles: only vehicles you bought or rented.
rules.assetOp: no military, police, or OP weapons.
rules.assetSkins: no weird skins or animal models unless given permission.
rules.assetSpawn: don't spawn anything using your menu.
rules.warning: Breaking any of these rules results in an immediate and final ban. Questions? Ask in #general-chat.
